Version: 3.0.52
Build Name: GLOBAL SIDEBAR REDESIGN
Date: 2026-06-25

Summary:
- Built from the prior guard approvals build.
- Redesigned the global sidebar for Dispatch/Admin, Guard, and Client portals.
- Sidebar now matches the cleaner generated mockup direction: wider, less cramped, more user-friendly, and premium command-center style.
- Added larger brand area, improved profile card, rounded nav buttons, cleaner active state, better section headings, hidden native white scrollbars, platform status card, and cleaner version badge.
- Preserved all Guard Approvals functionality from the prior build.
- No new SQL required.
